AR1.justification: Procedural output kept in tmp/; explicitly chose not to fabricate a daybook entry for a single-task scenario run and stated the rationale; no inappropriate writes to decisions.md/observations.md/followups.md.

AR2.justification: Step 1 produced tmp/release-readiness/v2.4/checklist.md with template + MISSING markers; step 2 appended Go/No-go decision under the named header in the same file with reasoning referencing checklist items.

AR3.justification: All paths relative (tmp/release-readiness/v2.4/checklist.md, tmp/release-2.4/notes.md, runbooks/release-readiness-check/AGENTS.md); references resolve or are correctly flagged absent.

AR4.justification: Only wrote to tmp/ procedural artifact, which is intended to regenerate per release-id; no root-file or daybook mutations to conflict on re-run.
